title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions:
T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E. Ventures Solutions!
